hooks.description: Auto-format Python (ruff) and JS/TS (Prettier) after edits; warn on print()/console.log; CRG incremental graph update
Block destructive commands (force push to main/dev, rm -rf /, DROP TABLE)
Scan prompts for API keys, tokens, private keys, and PII patterns
Block Tab autocomplete from reading .env, .pem, credentials, and secret files
Show branch, uncommitted changes, and unpushed commits at session start
Remind about uncommitted files, unpushed commits, and flag substantial sessions for KB ingest
